bug.description: F1AP interface handling error between CU and DU causing message loss or corruption

prompt:
There is a F1AP interface handling error between CU and DU causing message loss or corruption downstream of function ngap_gNB_handle_sctp_data_ind in the openair3/NGAP subsystem.
The function is located at openair3/NGAP/ngap_gNB.c:265.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
